heading: Filing of claims; notice in Federal Register
label: 1641e Filing of claims; notice in Federal Register
notes: Amendments1974—Subsec. (a). , substituted “paragraph (1), (2), or (3) of ” for “this subchapter”.Pub. L. 93–460, § 1(4)(A)section 1641b of this titleSubsecs. (c), (d). , added subsecs. (c) and (d).Pub. L. 93–460, § 1(4)(B)1968— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 90–421

children.heading: Time period
children.label: a Time period
children.text: Within sixty days after , or within sixty days after the date of enactment of legislation making appropriations to the Commission for payment of administrative expenses incurred in carrying out its functions under paragraph (1), (2), or (3) of , whichever date is later, the Commission shall publish in the Federal Register the time when and the limit of time within which claims may be filed under paragraph (1), (2), or (3) of , which limit shall not be more than one year after such publication, except that with respect to claims under this limit shall not exceed six months.August 9, 1955section 1641b of this titlesection 1641b of this titlesection 1641d of this title

children.heading: Property taken in Bulgaria and Rumania
children.label: b Property taken in Bulgaria and Rumania
children.text: Within thirty days after , or the enactment of legislation making appropriations to the Commission for payment of administrative expenses incurred in carrying out its functions under paragraph (4) of , whichever is later, the Commission shall publish in the Federal Register the time when and the limit of time within which claims may be filed under paragraph (4) of , which limit shall not be more than six months after such publication.July 24, 1968section 1641b of this titlesection 1641b of this title

children.heading: Property taken in Hungary
children.label: c Property taken in Hungary
children.text: Within thirty days after , or thirty days after enactment of legislation making appropriations to the Commission for payment of administrative expenses incurred in carrying out its functions under paragraph (5) of , whichever date is later, the Commission shall publish in the Federal Register the time when, and the limit of time within which, claims may be filed with the Commission under paragraph (5) of , which limit shall not be more than six months after such publication.October 20, 1974section 1641b of this titlesection 1641b of this title

children.heading: Failure to receive notice on Hungarian claims
children.label: d Failure to receive notice on Hungarian claims
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this section, any national of the United States who was mailed notice by any department or agency of the Government of the United States with respect to filing a claim against the Government of Hungary arising out of any of the failures referred to in paragraph (1), (2), or (3) of , and who did not receive the notice as the result of administrative error in placing a nonexistent address on the notice, may file with the Commission a claim under any such paragraph. The Commission shall publish in the Federal Register, within thirty days after , when the limit of time within which any such claim may be filed with the Commission, which limit shall not be more than six months after such publication.section 1641b of this titleOctober 20, 1974
